'''竏噐-h-j-l''' ('''kayahjeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deboard|deboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deboard|deboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-h-j-l
|-
! Lemma
| kayahjeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiyahjeloko || jiyahjeloko || shiyahjeloko || kiyahjeloko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuyahjeloko || jujuyahjeloko || shushuyahjeloko || kukuyahjeloko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuyahjeloko || juyahjeloko || shuyahjeloko || kuyahjeloko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuyahjeloko || juyahjeloko || shuyahjeloko || kuyahjeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theyahjeloko || jeyahjeloko || sheyahjeloko || keyahjeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoyahjeloko || jojoyahjeloko || shoshoyahjeloko || kokoyahjeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoyahjeloko || joyahjeloko || shoyahjeloko || koyahjeloko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoyahjeloko || joyahjeloko || shoyahjeloko || koyahjeloko
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yahjeloko || yahjeloko || yahjeloko || yahjeloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yahjeloko || yahjeloko || yahjeloko || yahjeloko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yahjeloko || yahjeloko || yahjeloko || yahjeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦyahjeloko || jﾃｦyahjeloko || shﾃｦyahjeloko || kﾃｦyahjeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathayahjeloko || jajayahjeloko || shashayahjeloko || kakayahjeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thayahjeloko || jayahjeloko || shayahjeloko || kayahjeloko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thayahjeloko || jayahjeloko || shayahjeloko || kayahjeloko
|}
